ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Harbor FR #157 local website identity environment facts.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Harbor repository, GitHub issue/PR metadata, and read-only research/source locators outside Harbor.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Harbor runtime-api files and HARBOR-161 Loom carriers only.
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #161 #162 #163 #164 #182 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Harbor runtime-api files and HARBOR-161 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Lode, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions.

ownership_constraints_detail.external_action_boundary: No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions.

integration_evidence: Local identity environment model integrated into runtime-api exports and HarborRuntime.getLocalIdentityEnvironmentFacts.
Runtime smoke emits identityEnvironment fixture facts and asserts schema, recovery requirement, and consumer not-exposed boundary.

node:test coverage verifies site binding, login/storage lifecycle, environment summaries, provider binding, credential/manual-auth boundary, import/export/delete/local encryption boundary, and no sample plaintext protected material.

Validation passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm test with 17 tests, pnpm smoke:runtime, git diff --check, loom verify, loom fact-chain, loom suite validate, loom suite evidence validate, loom suite carrier validate.

code: Local identity environment model integrated into runtime-api exports and HarborRuntime.getLocalIdentityEnvironmentFacts.
Runtime smoke emits identityEnvironment fixture facts and asserts schema, recovery requirement, and consumer not-exposed boundary.

node:test coverage verifies site binding, login/storage lifecycle, environment summaries, provider binding, credential/manual-auth boundary, import/export/delete/local encryption boundary, and no sample plaintext protected material.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: Facts/fixture contract slice with no persistent storage migration, no real browser launch, no external account/profile use, and no cross-repo schema publication.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: App/Core/Lode receive public summaries, refs, readiness states, blocking reasons, and no-bypass risk boundary only.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when adding persistent identity storage, real profile import/export/delete, real keychain integration, live site authentication, cross-repo API schema publication, or external visible account actions.
